series_metadata.series_title: Request for Transfer of Funds (Form No. CB-3)
series_metadata.series_description: This is used to request transfer of General Appropriations and Reallotment by quarters. This applies to operating funds only. A) original & 6 copies - Controlling Board. B) Pink - Fiscal Files

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office audit, and audit report is released
